subcodes.first_line: O Blessed Beauty! Solomon, son of David—upon him be peace—besought Thee: "Grant me a sovereignty such as shall not befit anyone else." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جمال مبارکک بنده سی سلیمان ابن داود علیه السلام رب هب لی ملکا لاینبغی لاحد
subcodes.subjects: @outward and inward meanings, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @Judaism; the Torah; the Jewish people, @universal peace; world unity
